title: astragalus onobrychis f. leucanthus
intro: Astragalus onobrychis f. leucanthus, also known as the white-flowered onobrychis, is a plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus onobrychis f. leucanthus are believed to include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and enhancing overall well-being. It is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and also used in herbal supplements, where it is valued for its adaptogenic properties.
